items.title_en: ASML jumps over 7% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
items.title_zh: 由于人工智能芯片需求强劲，ASML今年第二次上调销售预期，股价上涨逾7%
items.desc_en: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.
items.desc_zh: 随着客户继续提高人工智能芯片的产能，ASML 周三第二次上调了其指导方针。

items.title_en: One Person Is Dead and Three Are Missing After Boat Capsizes Near Alcatraz - The New York Times

items.title_en: U.S. strikes Iranian missile sites, defense systems and reinstates port blockade
items.title_zh: 美国袭击伊朗导弹基地、防御系统并恢复港口封锁
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has said the U.S.-Iran ceasefire is over following multiple flare-ups of hostilities in the region.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，在该地区多次爆发敌对行动后，美国与伊朗的停火已经结束。

items.title_en: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
items.title_zh: 中国经济增速大幅下滑，未达目标
items.desc_en: Weak demand domestically and the impact of the Iran war on oil prices overshadowed the country's strong exports.
items.desc_zh: 国内需求疲软以及伊朗战争对油价的影响掩盖了该国强劲的出口。

items.title_en: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
items.title_zh: 为什么欧洲突然对无人机下了大赌注
items.desc_en: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.
items.desc_zh: 无人机和自主系统正在从小众战场工具转变为现代战争的核心部分。

items.title_en: Stripe, Advent offer to buy PayPal for more than $53 billion: Reuters
items.title_zh: Stripe 和 Advent 提出以超过 530 亿美元收购 PayPal：路透社
items.desc_en: Stripe and Advent International have made a joint offer to acquire PayPal Holdings Inc for $60.50 per share, in a deal that would value the payments company at more than $53 billion.
items.desc_zh: Stripe 和 Advent International 联合提出以每股 60.5 美元收购 PayPal Holdings Inc 的要约，这笔交易将使该支付公司的估值超过 530 亿美元。

items.title_en: Oil rises after another round of U.S. strikes against Iran, naval blockade of the country's ports
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗进行新一轮打击并对该国港口实施海上封锁后油价上涨
items.desc_en: Oil prices rose Wednesday after U.S. forces struck Tehran and Washington reinstated its naval blockade of Iranian ports near the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 在美军袭击德黑兰和华盛顿恢复对霍尔木兹海峡附近伊朗港口的海上封锁后，油价周三上涨。

items.title_en: China posts slowest quarterly growth since 2022 as investment slumps, fanning stimulus calls
items.title_zh: 由于投资下滑，刺激呼声高涨，中国季度经济增速为2022年以来最慢
items.desc_en: That second-quarter growth came below Beijing's full-year growth target range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal in decades.
items.desc_zh: 第二季度的增长低于北京4.5%至5%的全年增长目标范围，这是几十年来最不雄心勃勃的目标。

items.desc_zh: 部长们声称这篇文章引用了他们的豪华平房交易，玷污了他们的声誉。

items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.

items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener

items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
